diff_summary: 1 line changed in commands/clean.md (line 589): 'If satisfied: Changes already committed' replaced with 'If satisfied: Changes already committed — to publish to remote: run `/commit` (to register the commit and write the push token), then `/push`'

no-inline-code.notes: Line 589 change adds /commit and /push as backtick slash-command references within a markdown bullet point, not bash/python code blocks. No violation introduced.

no-hardcoded-values.notes: commands/clean.md is an orchestration .md file, not a script. Standard 2 applies to scripts only.

use-source-venv.notes: One match for 'python3' found at line 637 ('Fixed Z python3 calls to use venv') — this is a completion report template placeholder string, not an invocation. No violation.

integer-step-numbering.notes: No decimal step patterns (Step N.M) or lettered step patterns found in clean.md.

meaningful-naming.notes: No forbidden naming patterns (enhance-*, fast-*, optimize-*, *-v2, *-v3, improved-*, better-*, new-*) found.

english-only.notes: commands/clean.md contains no Chinese characters. Unconditional scan of commands/ and agents/ found pre-existing Chinese text in commands/dev.md (lines 249, 1390-1392) — logged as pre_existing_observations, introduced_in_diff: false.

merge-similar-scripts.notes: Standard 7 applies to scripts, not .md orchestration files.

concise-documentation.notes: The added text at line 589 is a single functional sentence explaining publish steps. No verbose language, marketing text, or repetitive examples introduced.

parameterized-scripts.notes: Standard 9 applies to scripts, not .md orchestration files.

dangling-references.notes: All script references in clean.md verified to exist: orchestrator.sh, scan-project.sh, discover-folders.sh, check-readme-freshness.sh, check-file-references.sh, normalize-doc-names.sh, update-gitignore.sh, todo/clean.py, plan-style-inspection.sh. No dangling references.

merge-conflicts.notes: No merge conflict markers (<<<<<<, >>>>>>, =======) found in commands/clean.md.

Codex also noted the pre-existing Chinese text in commands/dev.md is outside the changed-file/introduced-diff scope and correctly not counted as a new violation.
